articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: In less than two weeks, the PM faces a crucial set of elections in Scotland, Wales and for many English councils.
articles.title: A grim week for Keir Starmer – but things could be about to get worse

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: An internal Pentagon document reportedly raised the prospect of a change in position in retaliation for the UK not joining the Iran war.
articles.title: No 10 say Falkland sovereignty rests with UK after report of US 'review'

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: Passwords have long been the default way we secure accounts online but the NCSC has said passkeys are a better option.
articles.title: What are passkeys and why do UK cyber chiefs want us to use them?

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: The EU's anti-fraud office confirms it has "sufficient information" to launch  an investigation, but does not say if it involves fraud.
articles.title: Mandelson under formal investigation by EU's anti-fraud office

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: The British Israeli man says he was detained after someone took offence at his kippah embroidered with Israeli and Palestinian flags.
articles.title: Israeli police investigate after officers 'cut Palestinian flag' from skullcap

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: A judge tells John Ashby, 32, that he will serve at least 14 years in prison for the attack.
articles.title: Man handed life sentence for rape and religiously aggravated abuse of Sikh woman

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: After having his passport by police confiscated Rory McColl was released on bail but unable to leave the country.
articles.title: Scots backpacker could face jail in Thailand over mobile phone 'mistake'

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: The Israeli prime minister says he is "in excellent physical condition" after having a malignant tumour removed.
articles.title: Benjamin Netanyahu treated for early-stage prostate cancer

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: Victims tell how Steve Figg left their homes – and relationships – on the verge of collapse.
articles.title: Essex couples who paid builder Steve Figg tell of bad experiences

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: In June 2025 MPs backed the legislation but now it has run out of time to become law.
articles.title: The assisted dying bill has failed - but the debate isn't over
